name: Necrozma

forms.name: Dusk-Mane
forms.pokedexDescription: Necrozma has attached itself to Solgaleo. It siphons away its host's limitless energy, exploiting that energy to fuel a rampage.

forms.name: Dawn-Wings
forms.pokedexDescription: When Necrozma latches on to Lunala, it becomes vicious, seeing enemies everywhere it looks. It will burn the world with lasers.

forms.name: Ultra
forms.pokedexDescription: The light pouring out from all over its body affects living things and nature, impacting them in various ways.

forms.name: necgross
forms.pokedexDescription: Necrozma appears to have fully absorbed Metagross. It grips its opponent with massive claws and begins the countdown to a massive explosion!

pokedexDescription: Light is the source of its energy. If it isn't devouring light, impurities build up in it and on it, and Necrozma darkens and stops moving.
